title: BounceCraft: ModernConflict
description: Modern technical survival with industries, weapons, vehicles, and advanced warfare. Automate, dominate the world, face creepy creatures, and live in a technologically advanced society ruled by nations.
body:
### English

BounceCraft: ModernConflict is a technical survival modpack blending modern warfare, advanced industry, and futuristic technology. Build complex factories with Create, develop realistic vehicles and weapons, manage resources, explore the world, and face unique creatures from Alex’s Mobs. Live in a modern society ruled by nations, automate large-scale industrial processes, and engage in sophisticated military strategies. A full experience for players who love building, fighting, and dominating a technologically advanced world.

### Italiano

BounceCraft: ModernConflict è un modpack survival tecnico che combina guerra moderna, industria avanzata e tecnologia futuristica. Costruisci fabbriche complesse con Create, sviluppa veicoli e armi realistiche, gestisci risorse, esplora il mondo e affronta creature uniche di Alex’s Mobs. Vivi in una società moderna guidata dalle nazioni, automatizza processi industriali su larga scala e preparati a strategie militari sofisticate. Un’esperienza completa per chi ama costruire, combattere e dominare un mondo tecnologicamente avanzato.
